rulings.Case Title: ROBERT JAMES HANSON VS. SEQUOIA VENTURES, INC.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Collins Electrical Company, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment: Hearing required to discuss briefing schedules, and hearing date. Hearing will be at 9:45 a.m. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: WOODROW THOMAS VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 6, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Hennessy Industries, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: LOUISE HENKE VS. AC AND S, INC.
